query:
SELECT 
  id,
  nome,
  origem,
  status,
  origemWebhook,
  createdAt,
  CASE WHEN origem = 'facebook' AND status = 'Aguardando Atendimento' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as priority
FROM leads
WHERE corretorId = 2
ORDER BY 
  CASE WHEN origem = 'facebook' AND status = 'Aguardando Atendimento' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC,
  origemWebhook DESC,
  createdAt DESC
LIMIT 15;
